message:
Sort missing beads in validation report and add forbidden system.exec cap

reqcheck: Sort missing_beads vector before returning in ValidationReport
so test assertions are deterministic regardless of HashSet iteration
order. Update test to assert exact sorted order.

registry: Add "system.exec" to the forbidden capabilities list in the
test connector manifest, aligning with the security posture established
in the install template.
